overview.summary: Queues are FIFO (First-In-First-Out) data structures, just like a line at a store.
learningObjectives: Learn to use queues for breadth first search and scheduling
overview.interviewRelevance: Crucial for Breadth-First Search (BFS) and concurrent systems scheduling.

paragraphs: Print queues, CPU process scheduling, BFS graph search, and rate limiters all use queues.
The reason your 100 print jobs come out in order is because the print spooler enqueues each job and processes them FIFO.
realWorldHook.ahaMoment: A queue ensures fair processing: the first task that arrives is guaranteed to be the first task completed.

definition.technicalDefinition: A queue is a linear data structure that follows the First-In-First-Out (FIFO) principle, where elements are added at the rear and removed from the front.

vocabulary.definition: Add an element to the rear of the queue.
Remove an element from the front of the queue.
Front is where exits happen, Tail is where entrances happen.

keyProperties: Enqueue and Dequeue are O(1) time.
Maintains the strict chronological arrival order.
Requires a linked list or circular array to achieve O(1) dequeue.

operations.name: Enqueue
operations.description: Place an item at the back of the line.
operations.visualNote: A new block enters from the right.

operations.name: Dequeue
operations.description: Remove the item at the front of the line.

code.javascript: const val = queue.shift(); // Warning: O(N) in JS arrays

operations.visualNote: The leftmost block exits the sequence.

operations.name: Front / Peek
operations.description: Look at the front item without removing it.

practice.title: Number of Islands (BFS)
practice.keyInsight: A queue explores the grid layer by layer.

practice.title: Implement Stack using Queues
practice.keyInsight: Rotate the queue after every push to simulate LIFO.

practice.title: Design Circular Queue
practice.keyInsight: Use an array with wrap-around pointers.

practice.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
practice.keyInsight: Queue tracks nodes of current depth.

practice.title: Rotting Oranges
practice.keyInsight: Multi-source BFS using a queue of initial rotted coords.
